_comment: Allowlist for the GitHub<->HF-Space module-drift guard (a11oy). ignore_paths/ignore_extensions are excluded entirely (built SPA bundles, vendored + binary assets, and CI-only page-claim manifests under pages/claims/** that are never served by the Space). accepted_divergences are KNOWN, pre-existing GitHub<->HF divergences recorded so the guard lands green; each is still printed as a warning every run. Remove an entry once the file is reconciled so any FUTURE re-divergence fails the job.

accepted_divergences.static/3d/selftest/fabric_smoke.mjs: ahead=github, pending Forge redeploy of main commit 1c356bb (PR #503, the SAFE-NOW private-IP leak CI gate). #503 scrubbed two private tailnet endpoints (http://100.125.77.31:11434, http://100.76.58.50:11434) out of the mocked LIVE_PAYLOAD in this headless smoke-test fixture, replacing them with honest 'sovereign-gpu (scrubbed)' / 'tailnet-gpu (scrubbed)' labels (smoke-test pass count unchanged). GitHub main holds the scrubbed file; the live HF Space still serves the pre-scrub copy until the box redeploys the Docker image. Pre-existing main drift, NOT introduced by the contrast/defer/Server-header hardening commit. Remove this entry once the box redeploys main and the OIDs reconcile.
accepted_divergences.govern_showcase.html: ahead=huggingface, direct HF edit detected. Added to hf-sync mirror set on 2026-06-30 (CI sweep Dev C) so future GitHub edits auto-propagate. Founder review required: if the HF edit is intentional, pull the HF version to GitHub and remove this entry; otherwise the next hf-sync push will reconcile GitHub→HF. Do NOT leave this entry permanently.
accepted_divergences.a11oy_landing.html: ahead=github, a11oy_landing.html added to hf-sync mirror set on 2026-06-30 (CI sweep Dev C). Next hf-sync push (triggered by any main push to a11oy_landing.html or govern_showcase.html) will reconcile GitHub→HF. Remove this entry once the OIDs match.
